headline: Badland Banditos: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Badland Banditos is projected #10 of 16 with a 77.33 championship-lineup C-AVI average, led by Ja'Marr Chase, Brock Bowers, and Kenneth Walker. The immediate priority is improving the FLEX slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Verified championship-lineup C-AVI average from all 16 AVI-Core knowledge team files

latest_trade.summary: On June 24, Badland Banditos traded with Crimson Tide Pods and acquired Kenneth Walker, 2027 Round 3 (Crimson Tide Pods) while sending Chris Rodriguez, 2026 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.), 2026 Round 1 (All Hail King Jesus). Kenneth Walker is now the current RB starter at 87.5 C-AVI and 87.0 D-AVI; The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 1 draft asset.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the FLEX slot above Jayden Higgins's 51.4 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 58.5 C-AVI would directly attack the 0.89-point projected gap to Southside Savages.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On July 15, DMV Fantasy traded with Big Balder Brand and acquired George Kittle, Brenton Strange, 2026 Round 1 (Conquistadors), 2028 Round 1 (Big Balder Brand) while sending Trey McBride. George Kittle is now the current TE starter at 79.5 C-AVI and 82.2 D-AVI; Brenton Strange is now the current FLEX starter at 62.1 C-AVI and 77.4 D-AVI; The deal added 2 draft assets.

rival_below.summary: On July 15, DMV Fantasy traded with Big Balder Brand and acquired George Kittle, Brenton Strange, 2026 Round 1 (Conquistadors), 2028 Round 1 (Big Balder Brand) while sending Trey McBride. George Kittle is now the current TE starter at 79.5 C-AVI and 82.2 D-AVI; Brenton Strange is now the current FLEX starter at 62.1 C-AVI and 77.4 D-AVI; The deal added 2 draft assets.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #10 of 16 at 77.33 lineup C-AVI. Southside Savages is immediately above at 78.22, a gap of 0.89. DMV Fantasy is immediately behind at 73.91.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Ja'Marr Chase (99.6), Brock Bowers (99.0), and Kenneth Walker (87.5).

sections.title: Latest Trade Impact
sections.body: On June 24, Badland Banditos traded with Crimson Tide Pods and acquired Kenneth Walker, 2027 Round 3 (Crimson Tide Pods) while sending Chris Rodriguez, 2026 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.), 2026 Round 1 (All Hail King Jesus). Kenneth Walker is now the current RB starter at 87.5 C-AVI and 87.0 D-AVI; The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 1 draft asset.

sections.title: Moves to Close the Gap
sections.body: Raise the FLEX slot above Jayden Higgins's 51.4 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 58.5 C-AVI would directly attack the 0.89-point projected gap to Southside Savages. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
